title: stelis atomacea
intro: Stelis atomacea, also known as the atom bee orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis atomacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis atomacea can be found in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
